item.description: Chief Technical Officer at Element Ventures London I completed my PhD, Machine Learning for Decision Making Under Uncertainty, under the supervision of Rémi Munos and Alessandro Lazaric as part of the SequeL team at INRIA-Lille Nord Europe; and, Held research fellowships with Rama Cont at the University of Oxford, Mathematical Institute, and the CFM-Imperial Institute of Quantitative Finance in the Department of Mathematics at Imperial College London; Andrea Roventinit at the Institute of Economics at Scuola Superiore Sant’Anna Pisa, as a member of the EU Horizons 2020 Future and Emerging Technologies ISIGrowth project; with Antoine Mandel at the Centre d'Économie de la Sorbonne in Université Paris 1, Panthéon-Sorbonne, as a member of the EU Horizons 2020 Future and Emerging Technologies DOLFINS project.
